speaker:
FIRST
               
              GROOM
text: More rushes, more rushes.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GROOM
text: The trumpets have sounded twice.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GROOM
text: ’Twill be two o’clock ere they come

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GROOM
text: from the coronation. Dispatch, dispatch.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: Stand here by me, Master Robert Shallow. I

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: will make the King do you grace. I will leer upon

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: him as he comes by, and do but mark the countenance

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: that he will give me.

speaker: PISTOL
text: God bless thy lungs, good knight!

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: Come here, Pistol, stand behind me.—O, if I

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: had had time to have made new liveries, I would

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: have bestowed the thousand pound I borrowed of

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: you. But ’tis no matter. This poor show doth better.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: This doth infer the zeal I had to see him.

speaker: SHALLOW
text: It doth so.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: It shows my earnestness of affection—

speaker: SHALLOW
text: It doth so.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: My devotion—

speaker: SHALLOW
text: It doth, it doth, it doth.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: As it were, to ride day and night, and not to

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: deliberate, not to remember, not to have patience

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: to shift me—

speaker: SHALLOW
text: It is best, certain.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: But to stand stained with travel and sweating

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: with desire to see him, thinking of nothing else,

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: putting all affairs else in oblivion, as if there were

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: nothing else to be done but to see him.

speaker: PISTOL
text: ’Tis semper idem, for obsque hoc nihil est; ’tis

speaker: PISTOL
text: all in every part.

speaker: SHALLOW
text: ’Tis so indeed.

speaker: PISTOL
text: My knight, I will inflame thy noble liver, and

speaker: PISTOL
text: make thee rage. Thy Doll and Helen of thy noble

speaker: PISTOL
text: thoughts is in base durance and contagious prison,

speaker: PISTOL
text: haled thither by most mechanical and dirty hand.

speaker: PISTOL
text: Rouse up revenge from ebon den with fell Alecto’s

speaker: PISTOL
text: snake, for Doll is in. Pistol speaks nought but truth.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: I will deliver her.

speaker: PISTOL
text: There roared the sea, and trumpet-clangor sounds.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: God save thy Grace, King Hal, my royal Hal.

speaker: PISTOL
text: The heavens thee guard and keep, most royal imp of fame!

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: God save thee, my sweet boy!

speaker: KING
text: My Lord Chief Justice, speak to that vain man.

speaker:
CHIEF
               
              JUSTICE
text: Have you your wits? Know you what ’tis you speak?

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: My king, my Jove, I speak to thee, my heart!

speaker: KING
text: I know thee not, old man. Fall to thy prayers.

speaker: KING
text: How ill white hairs becomes a fool and jester.

speaker: KING
text: I have long dreamt of such a kind of man,

speaker: KING
text: So surfeit-swelled, so old, and so profane;

speaker: KING
text: But being awaked, I do despise my dream.

speaker: KING
text: Make less thy body hence, and more thy grace;

speaker: KING
text: Leave gormandizing. Know the grave doth gape

speaker: KING
text: For thee thrice wider than for other men.

speaker: KING
text: Reply not to me with a fool-born jest.

speaker: KING
text: Presume not that I am the thing I was,

speaker: KING
text: For God doth know—so shall the world perceive—

speaker: KING
text: That I have turned away my former self.

speaker: KING
text: So will I those that kept me company.

speaker: KING
text: When thou dost hear I am as I have been,

speaker: KING
text: Approach me, and thou shalt be as thou wast,

speaker: KING
text: The tutor and the feeder of my riots.

speaker: KING
text: Till then I banish thee, on pain of death,

speaker: KING
text: As I have done the rest of my misleaders,

speaker: KING
text: Not to come near our person by ten mile.

speaker: KING
text: For competence of life I will allow you,

speaker: KING
text: That lack of means enforce you not to evils.

speaker: KING
text: And, as we hear you do reform yourselves,

speaker: KING
text: We will, according to your strengths and qualities,

speaker: KING
text:
Give you advancement.
                 
                To
                 
                the
                 
                Lord
                 
                Chief
                 
                Justice
                .
              Be it your charge, my lord,

speaker: KING
text: To see performed the tenor of my word.—

speaker: KING
text: Set on.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: Master Shallow, I owe you a thousand pound.

speaker: SHALLOW
text: Yea, marry, Sir John, which I beseech you to

speaker: SHALLOW
text: let me have home with me.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: That can hardly be, Master Shallow. Do not

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: you grieve at this. I shall be sent for in private to

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: him. Look you, he must seem thus to the world.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: Fear not your advancements. I will be the man yet

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: that shall make you great.

speaker: SHALLOW
text: I cannot well perceive how, unless you

speaker: SHALLOW
text: should give me your doublet and stuff me out with

speaker: SHALLOW
text: straw. I beseech you, good Sir John, let me have five

speaker: SHALLOW
text: hundred of my thousand.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: Sir, I will be as good as my word. This that

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: you heard was but a color.

speaker: SHALLOW
text: A color that I fear you will die in, Sir John.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: Fear no colors. Go with me to dinner.—

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: Come, lieutenant Pistol.—Come, Bardolph.—I

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: shall be sent for soon at night.

speaker:
CHIEF
               
              JUSTICE
text: Go, carry Sir John Falstaff to the Fleet.

speaker:
CHIEF
               
              JUSTICE
text: Take all his company along with him.

speaker: FALSTAFF
text: My lord, my lord —

speaker:
CHIEF
               
              JUSTICE
text: I cannot now speak. I will hear you soon.— Take them away.

speaker: PISTOL
text: Si fortuna me tormenta, spero me contenta.

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: I like this fair proceeding of the King’s.

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: He hath intent his wonted followers

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: Shall all be very well provided for,

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: But all are banished till their conversations

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: Appear more wise and modest to the world.

speaker:
CHIEF
               
              JUSTICE
text: And so they are.

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: The King hath called his parliament, my lord.

speaker:
CHIEF
               
              JUSTICE
text: He hath.

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: I will lay odds that, ere this year expire,

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: We bear our civil swords and native fire

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: As far as France. I heard a bird so sing,

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: Whose music, to my thinking, pleased the King.

speaker:
JOHN
               
              OF
               
              LANCASTER
text: Come, will you hence?
